365 J1900A_FALL_NO_INJURY_CD J1900A_FALL_NO_INJURY_CD J1900A Number of Falls Since Admission or Prior Assessment With No Injury Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of falls that resulted in no injury - no evidence of any injury is noted on physical assessment by the nurses or primary care clinician;
